result.stdout:
Description:
  MiniCover - Code coverage for .NET Core via assembly instrumentation

Usage:
  minicover [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  instrument       Instrument assemblies
  uninstrument     Uninstrument assemblies
  reset            Reset hits count
  report           Outputs coverage report
  htmlreport       Write html report to folder
  xmlreport        Write an NCover-formatted XML report to file
  opencoverreport  Write an OpenCover-formatted XML report to file
  cloverreport     Write an Clover-formatted XML report to file
  coverallsreport  Write a coveralls-formatted JSON report to folder
  coberturareport  Write a Cobertura-formatted XML report to file

commands.payload:
Description:
  MiniCover - Code coverage for .NET Core via assembly instrumentation

result.stdout:
Description:
  Write an Clover-formatted XML report to file

Usage:
  minicover cloverreport [options]

Options:
  --workdir <workdir>              Change working directory [default: ./]
  --coverage-file <coverage-file>  Coverage file name [default: ./coverage.json]
  --output <output>                Output file for Clover report [default: ./clover.xml]
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Write a coveralls-formatted JSON report to folder

Usage:
  minicover coverallsreport [options]

Options:
  --workdir <workdir>                                Change working directory [default: ./]
  --coverage-file <coverage-file>                    Coverage file name [default: ./coverage.json]
  --root-path <root-path>                            Set the git root path
  --output <output>                                  Output file for coveralls report
  --service-job-id <service-job-id>                  Define service_job_id in coveralls json
  --service-name <service-name>                      Define service_name in coveralls json
  --repo-token <repo-token>                          set the repo token
  --commit <commit>                                  set the git commit id
  --commit-message <commit-message>                  set the commit message
  --commit-author-name <commit-author-name>          set the commit author name
  --commit-author-email <commit-author-email>        set the commit author email
  --commit-committer-name <commit-committer-name>    set the commit committer name
  --commit-committer-email <commit-committer-email>  set the commit committer email
  --branch <branch>                                  set the git branch
  --remote <remote>                                  set the git remote name
  --remote-url <remote-url>                          set the git remote url
  -?, -h, --help                                     Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  minicover coverallsreport [options]

Options:

  --branch <branch>                                  set the git branch
  --remote <remote>                                  set the git remote name
  --remote-url <remote-url>                          set the git remote url
  -?, -h, --help                                     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Write html report to folder

Usage:
  minicover htmlreport [options]

Options:
  --workdir <workdir>              Change working directory [default: ./]
  --coverage-file <coverage-file>  Coverage file name [default: ./coverage.json]
  --threshold <threshold>          Coverage percentage threshold [default: 90]
  --no-fail                        Do not fail this command if threshold is not met
  --output <output>                Output folder for html report [default: ./coverage-html]
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Options:

  --no-fail                        Do not fail this command if threshold is not met
  --output <output>                Output folder for html report [default: ./coverage-html]

result.stdout:
Description:
  Instrument assemblies

Usage:
  minicover instrument [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <verbosity>                Change verbosity level (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical) [default: Information]
  --workdir <workdir>                        Change working directory [default: ./]
  --parentdir <parentdir>                    Set parent directory for assemblies and source directories (if not used, falls back to --workdir)
  --assemblies <assemblies>                  Pattern to include assemblies [default: **/*.dll]
  --exclude-assemblies <exclude-assemblies>  Pattern to exclude assemblies [default: **/obj/**/*.dll]
  --sources <sources>                        Pattern to include source files [default: src/**/*.cs]
  --exclude-sources <exclude-sources>        Pattern to exclude source files [default: **/bin/**/*.cs **/obj/**/*.cs]
  --tests <tests>                            Pattern to include test files [default: tests/**/*.cs test/**/*.cs]
  --exclude-tests <exclude-tests>            Pattern to exclude source files [default: **/bin/**/*.cs **/obj/**/*.cs]
  --hits-directory <hits-directory>          Directory to store hits files [default: ./coverage-hits]
  --coverage-file <coverage-file>            Coverage file name [default: ./coverage.json]
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Instrument assemblies

Usage:
  minicover instrument [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <verbosity>                Change verbosity level (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical) [default: Information]
  --workdir <workdir>                        Change working directory [default: ./]
  --parentdir <parentdir>                    Set parent directory for assemblies and source directories (if not used, falls back to --workdir)
  --assemblies <assemblies>                  Pattern to include assemblies [default: **/*.dll]
  --exclude-assemblies <exclude-assemblies>  Pattern to exclude assemblies [default: **/obj/**/*.dll]
  --sources <sources>                        Pattern to include source files [default: src/**/*.cs]
  --exclude-sources <exclude-sources>        Pattern to exclude source files [default: **/bin/**/*.cs **/obj/**/*.cs]
  --tests <tests>                            Pattern to include test files [default: tests/**/*.cs test/**/*.cs]
  --exclude-tests <exclude-tests>            Pattern to exclude source files [default: **/bin/**/*.cs **/obj/**/*.cs]
  --hits-directory <hits-directory>          Directory to store hits files [default: ./coverage-hits]
  --coverage-file <coverage-file>            Coverage file name [default: ./coverage.json]
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information
